name: Full o' Boloney
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 Ounces Cream of mushroom soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the American cheese in a deep, 1-1/2 quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 15 minutes or until potatoes are tender. Stir occasionally.
3. Top casserole with cheese slices and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven an additional 30 seconds or just until cheese melts.
